# Vatan Indian Vegetarian Cuisine & Bakery

> Vatan is a 100% pure Indian vegetarian restaurant with locations in Jersey City, NJ
> and East Windsor, NJ. Founded November 11, 2009, Vatan serves authentic Gujarati,
> Kathiyawadi, and South Indian vegetarian cuisine including Thalis, Chaat, Dosa,
> Pav Bhaji, Chole Bhature, and Indian sweets and bakery items.

## Locations

- Jersey City: 808 Newark Ave, Jersey City, NJ 07306 | (201) 839-5426
  Hours: Mon–Sun 11:00 AM–3:00 PM, 4:30–9:30 PM
- East Windsor: 761 NJ-33 West, East Windsor, NJ 08520 | +1 609-336-7333
  Hours: Tue–Sun 11:00 AM–3:00 PM, 4:30–9:30 PM (Closed Mondays)
  Near BAPS Swaminarayan Akshardham and Swaminarayan Mandir (Robbinsville Swaminarayan Temple), Robbinsville, NJ
- Edison, NJ: Coming Soon

## Key Facts

- Founded: November 11, 2009
- Cuisine type: Indian vegetarian — Gujarati, Kathiyawadi, South Indian, Indo-Chinese, Punjabi
- Dietary: 100% vegetarian. Jain-friendly, Swaminarayan-friendly, and vegan options available.
- Catering: Available for weddings, corporate events, religious and cultural functions.
- Online ordering: https://vatans.com/order.html
- Reservations: https://vatans.com/reservations.html
- Full menu: https://vatans.com/all-menu.html

## Blog

https://vatans.com/blog.html
Topics: Indian vegetarian cuisine, seasonal dishes, catering guidance, Indian street food, Gujarati food culture.
